3D%2232%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%228%22%20fill%3D%22%23047857%22%2F%3E%20%3Crect%20x%3D%2240%22%20y%3D%2235%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%222%22%20fill%3D%22%23D4AF37%22%2F%3E%20%3Crect%20x%3D%2260%22%20y%3D%2232%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%228%22%20fill%3D%22%23F59E0B%22%2F%3E%20%3Crect%20x%3D%2260%22%20y%3D%2235%22%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%222%22%20fill%3D%22%23047857%22%2F%3E%20%3C%2Fsvg%3E
